Vij joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Jonathan Palmer to explain how Citizen Health is building an AI-powered advocate for patients with rare and complex diseases. He discusses the company’s mission to aggregate longitudinal health data, support caregivers, accelerate research and create a future where person

title_cn: 宏观问题：Huw Worthington 谈欧洲央行、英国国债和利率前景

Worthington explains why the ECB’s recent rate hike may already look too aggressive now that oil and gas prices have fallen back, and why the market may be overpricing further tightening if euro-area inflation undershoots target in 2027 and 2028. The

title: Odd Lots: How the 1994 World Cup Transformed Football (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：1994 年世界杯如何改变了足球（播客）
summary: The last time the World Cup came to the US was 1994. Before then, the World Cup was an enormously popular event with surprisingly limited commercial significance; the 1990 tournament in Italy, for instance, lost money for broadcasters. But that all changed in 1994, when American companies sought to make their mark in the form of advertisements and sponsorships: firms like McDonalds, Mastercard, and General Motors saw the potential to reach a global audience through one of the world’s most watche

title: Most Stocks Rise on Signs Economy Is in Good Shape: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 大多数股票因经济状况良好而上涨：市场总结
summary: Wall Street traders lifted most stocks as signs the world’s largest economy remains solid despite elevated inflation bolstered bets that Corporate America’s earnings will keep powering ahead.

title: How the 1994 World Cup Changed the Business of Football Forever
title_cn: 1994 年世界杯如何永远改变了足球行业
summary:
The World Cup had been an enormously popular event with surprisingly limited commercial significance; the 1990 tournament in Italy, for instance, lost money for broadcasters. Then the World Cup came to the US in 1994 and everything changed.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Joey D’Urso, author of More Than A Shirt, joins Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal to discuss how advertisements and sponsorships by American corporations like McDonalds and General Motors in the 1994 World Cup changed the business of the sport forever.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Airline Stocks Erase Pandemic-Era Losses as Oil Prices Ease
title_cn: 随着油价下跌，美国航空股消除了大流行时期的损失
summary: A popular gauge of the US airline industry has finally recovered from pandemic-era losses after six years, as progress on a peace deal between US and Iran pushed oil prices lower and eased the pressure on carriers’ profitability.

title: China Seeks to Raise €5 Billion in Record Euro Bond Sale
title_cn: 中国寻求筹集50亿欧元创纪录的欧元债券发行
summary: China is selling €5 billion ($5.7 billion) of euro-denominated bonds, its biggest ever deal in the currency and the second since November.

title: Three New ETFs to Watch
title_cn: 值得关注的三只新 ETF
summary: The SpaceX IPO set off a predictable frenzy—we look at who may lead the pack. Also, betting against AI, high-yield bonds, plus bonus mentions.

title: Private Credit Arbitrage Trade Gets Momentum as Redemptions Rise
title_cn: 随着赎回增加，私人信贷套利交易获得动力
summary: On paper, it seems like a no-brainer trade: Cash out of one private credit fund at 100% of net asset value and plow the money back into a similar vehicle that’s trading at a substantially discounted price.

title: CME Plans Wind Derivatives Launch for US, Europe, Australia
title_cn: 芝商所计划在美国、欧洲和澳大利亚推出风能衍生品
summary: The Chicago Mercantile Exchange plans to launch wind derivatives across three continents, according to a person familiar with the matter, as the role of renewable energy in power generation grows.

title: Billionaire Adani to Invest $2.1 Billion to Build Airport Cities
title_cn: 亿万富翁阿达尼将投资 21 亿美元建设机场城市
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s airport unit will invest 200 billion rupees ($2.1 billion) to build integrated cities across its network as the ports-to-power conglomerate expands into non-aviation businesses.

title: Oil Prices Swing as Traders Assess Pace of Hormuz Reopening
title_cn: 随着交易员评估霍尔木兹重新开放的步伐，油价波动
summary: Oil fluctuated as traders closely monitored increased shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, trying to gauge how quickly supply constraints will ease after the US and Iran signed a preliminary peace accord.

title: Rio Tinto in Talks With Vitol Over Venture to Cut Freight Costs
title_cn: 力拓与维托就合资降低货运成本进行谈判
summary: Rio Tinto Group is in talks with oil-trading giant Vitol Group about setting up a freight and logistics joint venture, less than five months after ending talks to buy rival miner and trader Glencore Plc.

title: Treasuries Gain as Inflation Gauge Cools Fed Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 随着通胀指标冷却美联储加息押注，美国国债上涨
summary: Treasuries gained after the Federal Reserve’s favored inflation gauge rose less than estimated, damping expectations for an interest-rate hike in the months ahead.

title: Ships Appear to U-Turn While Trying to Exit Hormuz by Oman Route
title_cn: 船舶试图通过阿曼航线离开霍尔木兹时出现掉头
summary: At least three ships, including two oil supertankers, appeared to turn around while attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz using a route that hugs Oman’s coastline.

title: Braskem Seeks Emergency Protection as Debt Talks Hit Snags
title_cn: 债务谈判遇到障碍，布拉斯科姆寻求紧急保护
summary: Brazilian petrochemical giant Braskem SA filed for emergency protection against creditors as talks with for an out-of-court solution to its mounting debt woes hit snags.

title: JPM’s Lake Exits, Resetting the Race to Succeed Dimon
title_cn: 摩根大通的莱克退出，重新启动戴蒙接班人的竞争
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. named Troy Rohrbaugh and Doug Petno co-presidents after the retirement of consumer banking chief Marianne Lake. Katherine Doherty reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Whipsaw as Apple Price Hikes Offset Chipmaker Strength
title_cn: 苹果股价上涨抵消了芯片制造商的实力，美国股市大幅震荡
summary: Stocks pared gains soon after opening as Apple Inc.’s move to raise prices on its products weighed on key indexes, unwinding some of the enthusiasm over strong chipmaker forecasts.

title: Ford CEO Jim Farley Says Culture Change Brought Quality Improvements
title_cn: 福特首席执行官吉姆·法利表示文化变革带来了质量提升
summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley says that a culture change at the automaker lead to Ford becoming a "four-year overnight success." Farley also says American workers are beating the likes of Toyota and Hyundai in terms of vehicle quality. Farley spoke with Bloomberg's Matthew Miller.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iraq Shows Frustration With OPEC in Push to Pump More Oil
title_cn: 伊拉克对欧佩克推动生产更多石油表示失望
summary: Iraq stepped up its push for bigger OPEC production quotas as it seeks to recoup oil sales that were lost because of the Iran war, even raising the prospect that it could consider an exit in the future.

title: What to Know About the Screwworm Threat to US Livestock
title_cn: 关于螺旋虫对美国牲畜的威胁需要了解什么
summary: Bloomberg's Julie Fine, Joe Lovinger and Elizabeth Elkin discuss the scope of the screwworm outbreak and what it means for the US beef industry and other livestock. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Raises Mac, iPad Prices on Memory Shortage; Shares Dive
title_cn: 苹果因内存短缺而提高 Mac、iPad 价格；股价跳水
summary: Apple Inc. took the extreme measure of raising prices of Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro on Thursday, seeking to offset cost hikes caused by an unprecedented shortage of memory chips and storage.

title: Getting to the World Cup Final Without Losing Your Mind
title_cn: 不失去理智进入世界杯决赛
summary: Massive crowds, limited parking and packed transit will make getting to the World Cup Final in New Jersey a logistical nightmare. Bloomberg's Aashna Shah and Randall Williams share the playbook to get to the match. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Backlash Is the Risk Wall Street Fears Can Stop Tech Stocks
title_cn: 人工智能的强烈反对是华尔街担忧可能阻止科技股上涨的风险
summary: Market professionals already on edge about the staying power of soaring artificial intelligence stocks are starting to grapple with another risk: public anger toward the technology.

title: Bitcoin’s $10 Billion Options Expiry Risks Deepening Selloff
title_cn: 比特币价值 100 亿美元的期权到期风险加剧抛售
summary: Bitcoin is facing a massive options expiry that risks putting more pressure on a market already struggling with fading institutional demand and macroeconomic headwinds.

title: US Inflation Climbs as Consumers Spent More in May
title_cn: 由于消费者五月份支出增加，美国通胀攀升
summary: US consumer spending accelerated in May even as prices rose at the fastest pace in more than three years. Inflation-adjusted consumer spending rose 0.3% from a month earlier. The personal consumption expenditures price index rose 4.1% last month from a year earlier. Enda Curran reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela Earthquake Death Toll Rises to at Least 164
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数上升至至少 164 人
summary: At least 164 people are dead and 1,000 injured after back-to-back earthquakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday. Buildings have collapsed and roads buckled. People took to the streets and looked for cover. A magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck first followed by a magnitude 7.5 quake less than a minute later west of Caracas. The US is sending search-and-rescue teams to help. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Steadies Near $4,000 as Traders Weigh Interest-Rate Outlook
title_cn: 交易员权衡利率前景，金价稳定在 4,000 美元附近
summary: Gold steadied after the release of US economic data, as traders slightly pulled back on expectations for interest rate hikes.

title: Copper Climbs as Dip-Buying and AI Rally Offset Rate Concerns
title_cn: 逢低买入和人工智能反弹抵消了利率担忧，铜价上涨
summary: Copper rallied from a seven-week low as signs of consumer buying and a rebound in global stock markets bolstered sentiment.

title: Wendy’s Shares Set to Extend Rally as Meme-Stock Crowd Piles In
title_cn: 随着迷因股票人群的涌入，温迪的股价将延续涨势
summary: Shares of Wendy’s Co. are poised to extend their advance for a second day as the meme-stock crowd pushes the iconic American burger chain stock even higher.

title: Why Fed Chairman Warsh’s Pivot Risks Confusing Markets
title_cn: 为什么美联储主席沃什的转向可能会令市场感到困惑
summary: Bill Dudley, former New York Fed President and Bloomberg Opinion columnist, says streamlining the Federal Open Market Committee’s policy statement is appropriate, but Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh needs to make changes with greater care than he has shown to date. Dudley says Warsh may risk confusing markets and the central bank itself. His opinions are his own. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe’s Heat Wave Is a Power-Market Pressure Test
title_cn: 欧洲热浪是对电力市场的压力测试
summary: Both France and the UK have seen temperature records this week that drove up electricity prices and strained the grid.

title: Major Saudi Oil Terminal to Restart as Gulf Reboot Ramps Up
title_cn: 随着海湾重启的加快，沙特主要石油码头将重新启动
summary: Top oil exporter Saudi Arabia is set to restart loading crude at the giant Ras Tanura terminal inside the Persian Gulf, a landmark moment in the resumption of Middle Eastern supplies after the Iran war.

title: Nvidia Wants to Make Humanoid AI Robots Safer Around Humans
title_cn: Nvidia 希望让类人人工智能机器人在人类身边更加安全
summary: Humanoid robots are getting smarter and moving closer to the real world. But before they can work alongside humans, Nvidia says they need something even more important: the ability to recognize danger and react in an instant. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow speaks with Deepu Talla, Vice President of Robotics and Edge AI at Nvidia, about the technology designed to make that possible. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cerebras On Track for Record Two-Day Loss as Outlook Disappoints
title_cn: 由于前景令人失望，Cerebras 有望创纪录的两天亏损
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares tumbled Thursday — and were on track for a record two-session loss — after the chipmaker gave a disappointing annual sales outlook.

title: DeepSeek Plans to Double Staff Across All Departments
title_cn: DeepSeek 计划将所有部门的员工人数增加一倍
summary: China’s DeepSeek, fresh off a blockbuster fundraising, said it is working to at least double the size of all departments, as it steps up efforts to compete with domestic rivals and global leaders such as OpenAI and Anthropic.

title: Apple Raises Prices on Some Products by $500
title_cn: Apple 将部分产品价格提高 500 美元
summary: Apple customers may experience sticker shock next time they look to buy one of many products. the company is raising prices of Macs, iPads, home devices, and the Vision Pro to offset cost hikes caused by a shortage of memory chips and storage. Prices for iPhone, Apple Watch and AirPods stay the same. Mark Gurman reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qualcomm Jumps on $15 billion Data Center Sales Projection
title_cn: 高通数据中心销售额预计将达到 150 亿美元
summary: Qualcomm Inc. shares jumped after the chipmaker forecast annual sales of more than $15 billion from artificial intelligence components in data centers by fiscal 2029.

title: Samsung Joins With US Battery Startup Seeking Pentagon Cash
title_cn: 三星与美国电池初创公司合作寻求五角大楼现金
summary: Samsung SDI Co. has agreed to provide $20 million and engineering support to Forge Nano Inc., a US battery startup aiming to build cells for the US defense and aerospace industries at a new plant in North Carolina.

title: SK Hynix, Micron Solidify the Memory Chip as Runaway Star of AI
title_cn: SK 海力士、美光巩固内存芯片，成为人工智能领域的明星
summary: With back-to-back announcements this week, SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. have solidified the memory chip market as the hottest part of the AI industry.

title: Micron Shares Soar After AI-Fueled Forecast Shatters Projections
title_cn: 人工智能推动的预测打破预测后，美光股价飙升
summary: Micron Technology Inc. shares surged after the largest US maker of computer memory chips issued a quarterly sales forecast that crushed Wall Street estimates, signaling that an AI-fueled growth run remains strong.

title: Apple Raises Prices on Macs, iPads, Home Devices
title_cn: 苹果提高 Mac、iPad 和家用设备的价格
summary: Apple is raising prices on several products to offset cost hikes caused by a shortage of memory chips and storage. Prices are going up for the MacBook Neo, MacBook Pro, MacBook Air, iPad Air and iPad Pro. Price hikes are global and vary by product.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Tech San Francisco 2026 Highlights
title_cn: 彭博科技旧金山 2026 年亮点
summary: Led by Bloomberg's Emily Chang and Tom Giles, Bloomberg Tech 2026 brought together the leading CEOs, investors, and innovators who are harnessing technology to change the world around us. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Cloud Provider IREN Gets Logo on Golden State Warriors Jerseys
title_cn: AI 云提供商 IREN 在金州勇士队球衣上获得徽标
summary: The latest sign of the AI data center boom going mainstream: IREN Ltd., an Australia-founded cloud computing provider, will have its logo featured on the jerseys of the Golden State Warriors starting next season.

title: For $4,500 a Week, AI Can Tutor Your Kids in the Hamptons
title_cn: 每周只需 4,500 美元，人工智能就能在汉普顿辅导你的孩子
summary: Artificial intelligence is coming to summer school in the Hamptons this year, with tech-powered programs teaching academics alongside lessons in how to prepare a gourmet meal and sell a luxury home.

title: EU Held Talks With White House on Anthropic After Mythos Cutoff
title_cn: 欧盟与白宫就神话切断后的人择问题举行会谈
summary: The European Union held discussions with the Trump administration on access to Anthropic PBC’s most advanced artificial intelligence models after the US restricted foreign nationals from accessing the technology earlier this month.

title: This $5 Billion Startup Is Putting Humanoid Robots To Work
title_cn: 这家价值 50 亿美元的初创公司正在将人形机器人投入工作
summary:
A $5 billion startup is putting humanoid robots to work in Texas. Joshua Brustein explains what it could mean for the potential of a machine-powered future.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BofA’s Raedler Says Defensives Ready to Roar if AI Trade Falters
title_cn: 美国银行的雷德勒表示，如果人工智能贸易陷入困境，防御者已准备好咆哮
summary: Investors should switch their focus to defensive sectors if the artificial intelligence trade starts to unravel, according to Sebastian Raedler, head of European equity strategy at Bank of America Corp.

title: AI Revenue Starts to Exceed a Key Infrastructure Cost But Not By Much
title_cn: 人工智能收入开始超过关键基础设施成本，但幅度不大
summary: Google and Amazon will need to sustain premium pricing and strong user growth if they are to recoup their investments

title: OpenAI, Anthropic and SpaceX Are Shaking Up VC Fundraising
title_cn: OpenAI、Anthropic 和 SpaceX 正在重组风险投资融资
summary: The potential for big gains allows firms to raise record amounts of money

title: A Veteran Apple Designer Reimagines the Golf Cart
title_cn: 一位资深的苹果设计师重新设计了高尔夫球车
summary: Julian Hoenig’s Amble is dreaming up next-generation course cruisers — and aiming far beyond the fairway.

title: US Customs Ramps Up AI Investment in Push to Sharpen Enforcement
title_cn: 美国海关加大人工智能投资以加强执法
summary: US customs authorities, under pressure to improve enforcement of President Donald Trump’s trade war, are increasingly turning to artificial intelligence to catch tariff dodgers and spot illicit goods before cargo even reaches the country.

title: AI Sales Start to Justify Data-Center Spending Boom, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，人工智能销售开始证明数据中心支出繁荣是合理的
summary: Revenue from artificial intelligence has reached a tipping point, showing that the hundreds of billions of dollars tech companies are spending on it may be economically sustainable, according to a report from research firm Exponential View.

title: Guild: Memory Chip Spending Can Be Underestimated
title_cn: Guild：内存芯片支出可能被低估
summary: Stephanie Guild, Robinhood CIO, joins Bloomberg’s Vonnie Quinn on “Bloomberg Brief” to break down the ramifications of Micron’s strong AI-driven earnings report, and how energy costs, computer memory, and supporting infrastructure are often overlooked elements in the AI trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Soars After AI-Fueled Forecast Shatters Estimates | The Opening Trade 6/25/2026
title_cn: 人工智能推动的预测打破预期后，美光股价飙升开盘交易 2026 年 6 月 25 日
summary:
Micron, the largest US maker of computer memory chips, surged in premarket trading after its quarterly sales forecast crushed Wall Street estimates, signaling that an AI-fueled growth run remains strong. Micron posted the results at a delicate moment for the AI industry. Shares of chipmakers and other technology companies had been hammered in recent days on fears that a spending boom was faltering.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-China Exec of Advertising Giant Sentenced to Life in $176 Million Bribery Case
title_cn: 广告巨头前中国高管因 1.76 亿美元贿赂案被判终身监禁
summary: A former executive of WPP Plc, one of the world’s biggest advertising companies, has been sentenced to life in prison by a Chinese court for taking bribes totaling 1.2 billion yuan ($176 million) with his ex-colleagues, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Russia Used Cellebrite Technology in Case Against Activist, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，俄罗斯在针对活动人士的案件中使用了 Cellebrite 技术
summary: Russian authorities used technology manufactured by Israeli digital forensics company Cellebrite to aid the prosecution of a prominent pro-democracy activist, according to a new report.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Cloud Units Face Tough EU Rules for Big Tech
title_cn: 微软、亚马逊云部门面临欧盟对大型科技公司的严格规定
summary: Microsoft Corp.’s Azure and Amazon Web Services face tough European Union guardrails after regulators said they should be targeted by the bloc’s Digital Markets Act.

title: Blackstone, Bain Are Said Among Bidders for Fuji Media Unit
title_cn: 据称黑石集团和贝恩资本是富士媒体部门的竞购者
summary: Investment firms including Blackstone Inc. and Bain Capital have advanced to the second round of bidding for the real estate unit of Fuji Media Holdings Inc., people familiar with the matter said, in what’s likely to be Japan’s biggest-ever property deal.

title: GoreBox Game Owner ‘Heartbroken’ by Philippine School Shooting
title_cn: GoreBox 游戏所有者被菲律宾校园枪击事件“心碎”
summary: The developer of an online game that was banned by the Philippines after a deadly school shooting said he was “heartbroken” by the incident, pledging to cooperate with authorities in Manila.

title: Amazon Pledges Additional $13 Billion in India AI Outlays
title_cn: 亚马逊承诺在印度人工智能领域追加 130 亿美元支出
summary: Amazon.com Inc. added $13 billion to its planned India investments, accelerating its buildout of artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure in the world’s most populous country.

title: SK Hynix ADR Seen Driving 30% Upside as Micron Gap Narrows
title_cn: 随着微米差距缩小，SK 海力士 ADR 有望上涨 30%
summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s push for a US listing is spurring talk of another prize for shareholders: a potentially higher market value that may narrow its gap with US rival Micron Technology Inc.

title: Supreme Court Backs Right to Carry by Voiding Hawaii Gun Law
title_cn: 最高法院通过废除夏威夷枪支法支持携带权
summary: The US Supreme Court strengthened the constitutional right to carry a gun, striking down a Hawaii law that barred people from bringing firearms to stores and other private property without the owner’s express permission.

title: Supreme Court Lets US End Protected Status for Haitians, Syrians
title_cn: 最高法院允许美国终止对海地人和叙利亚人的保护地位
summary: The US Supreme Court ruled that President Donald Trump has broad power to end legal protections for people from crisis-ridden countries in a decision that opens 350,000 Haitians and 7,000 Syrians to the prospect of deportation.

title: Brent Oil Erases Wartime Gains as Hormuz Reopening Boosts Supply
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡重新开放增加供应，布伦特石油抹去了战时收益
summary: Brent oil erased all of its wartime gains after flows through the Strait of Hormuz ramped up following progress on a US-Iran peace deal. Bloomberg's Rob Barnett joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swedish Opposition Sees Bank Tax Helping Households to Spend
title_cn: 瑞典反对派认为银行税有助于家庭消费
summary: A tax that Sweden’s opposition Social Democrats want to levy on the country’s banks would lead to lower costs for households and help them regain some of the purchasing power they lost over recent years, according to the party’s economic spokesperson.

title: Venezuela’s Snitching App Used For Earthquake Search and Rescue
title_cn: 委内瑞拉用于地震搜索和救援的告密应用程序
summary: A Venezuelan mobile application for snitching on dissidents is being repurposed as a search and rescue tool after Wednesday’s devastating earthquakes.

title: US Seeks AI Partnership With EU on Regulation, Supply Chains
title_cn: 美国寻求与欧盟在监管、供应链方面建立人工智能合作伙伴关系
summary: The US has proposed that the European Union sign on to an artificial intelligence partnership as part of an effort to create an alliance to secure supply chains for semiconductors as competition with China intensifies.

title: UK Polls Show Burnham Boost for Labour Against Farage’s Reform
title_cn: 英国民意调查显示伯纳姆支持工党反对法拉奇的改革
summary: Labour was given a boost on Thursday after twin surveys highlighted how the governing party’s likely new leader Andy Burnham may revive its fortunes and make up ground on Nigel Farage’s poll-leading Reform UK.

title: Ukraine Says It Made Fresh Attacks on Russian Oil Refineries
title_cn: 乌克兰称对俄罗斯炼油厂发动新袭击
summary: Ukraine said its drones hit two oil refineries in the Russian city of Ufa, the latest in a wave of strikes on its foe’s energy infrastructure that have led to fuel shortages.

title: NY’s MTA Chief Rejects Trump Deal on Penn Station Renovation
title_cn: 纽约 MTA 局长拒绝特朗普关于宾夕法尼亚车站改造的协议
summary: The head of New York City’s transit system is standing by his decision not to sign an agreement on Penn Station’s $7 billion renovation, saying he doesn’t want to enter a deal with President Donald Trump without protections.

title: Italy and France Balk at EU Proposal to Ban Ex-Russian Soldiers
title_cn: 意大利和法国对欧盟禁止前俄罗斯士兵的提议犹豫不决
summary: Italy and France are hesitant about a European Union proposal to ban former Russian combatants from entering the bloc, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Taiwan Drill Simulates Maritime ‘Quarantine’ by China Forces
title_cn: 台湾演习模拟中国军队海上“检疫”
summary: Taiwan has held tabletop military exercises to simulate its response to a potential maritime quarantine by China, National Security Council Deputy Secretary-General Lii Wen said at a briefing Thursday.

title: London Faces Huge Financial Cost Tied to Rising Heat, Mayor Says
title_cn: 伦敦市长表示，伦敦面临着与气温上升相关的巨大财务成本
summary: London’s efforts to deal with rising temperatures come at a considerable financial cost that will require the city to turn to private investors for help, the mayor of the UK capital said.

title: Property Tycoon With Ties to Reeves Left UK Before Tax Hit
title_cn: 与里夫斯有联系的房地产大亨在税收打击前离开英国
summary: A property magnate whose firm spent years forging ties with UK Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves left Britain the same week tax rises she implemented took effect, underlining the governing Labour Party’s frayed relations with the nation’s wealthy elite.

title: ‘Mad as a Murder Hornet’ Trump Spars With Disaffected Senate
title_cn: “疯狂如杀人大黄蜂”特朗普与心怀不满的参议院发生争执
summary: Tensions between Donald Trump and US Senate Republicans crescendoed to a fever-pitch during a Wednesday lunch after a 24-hour exchange that saw lawmakers rebuke the president over the war with Iran while he abruptly canceled a signing ceremony for legislation that the GOP sees as essential to its midterm election efforts.

title: Kenyan Police Block Roads Before Anniversary March
title_cn: 肯尼亚警方在周年纪念日游行前封锁道路
summary: Kenyan police blocked major roads into Nairobi and cordoned off parliament buildings before planned marches to mark two years since deadly anti-government demonstrations. More than 60 people died in the protests on June 25, 2024, many of them shot by police when they marched on parliament as lawmakers voted on unpopular tax measures introduced by President William Ruto’s administration. (Source: AP)

title: Trump Is Blowing Up the GOP’s Affordability Plans
title_cn: 特朗普正在摧毁共和党的负担能力计划
summary: A last-minute detour on the way to signing a housing bill spurs public grousing about the president’s focus

title: Europe Lauds Ukraine’s Newfound Strength as Aid Payouts Begin
title_cn: 随着援助支出的开始，欧洲赞扬乌克兰新发现的实力
summary: European Union officials hailed Ukraine’s progress in fighting off Russia’s invasion as the bloc began disbursing aid from its €90 billion ($102 billion) loan and held out the prospect for more investment in the war-torn country.

title: Conservatives Urge Overturn of Trump’s Biofuel Blending Quotas
title_cn: 保守派敦促推翻特朗普的生物燃料混合配额
summary: Nearly three dozen conservatives — including longtime allies of President Donald Trump — are pushing the House to overturn biofuel-blending quotas imposed by his administration, arguing they are stoking consumer costs before an election set to hinge on economic concerns.

title: Europe Defense Sector Has ‘Long Way to Go’, German Minister Says
title_cn: 德国部长表示欧洲国防部门“还有很长的路要走”
summary: Germany’s decision to scrap a €10 billion ($11.4 billion) warship purchase and the demise of a joint fighter-jet project with France show that Europe’s defense industry needs to catch up with the continent’s ambitions for a military buildup, a senior German defense official said.

title: Burnham Team Looks at Treasury Breakup and BOE Reforms
title_cn: 伯纳姆团队研究财政部拆分和英国央行改革
summary: Influential figures in Andy Burnham’s entourage have urged the would-be prime minister to break up the Treasury to refocus the government’s agenda on growth.

title: US Protests China Visa Rules by Snubbing APEC Meet in Macau
title_cn: 美国拒绝在澳门举行的亚太经合组织会议，抗议中国签证规定
summary: The US has decided against sending senior officials to an Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation meeting in Macau, blaming what it called China’s “discriminatory” visa rules on American diplomats.

title: Japan Unveils Multi-Year Framework as Part of Budget Reform
title_cn: 日本公布多年框架作为预算改革的一部分
summary: Japan will create a new multi-year framework to finance policies aimed at boosting its growth potential as part of Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s overhaul of the country’s budgeting process.

title: Macron Says French Navy Boards Shadow Fleet Tanker Off Sicily
title_cn: 马克龙称法国海军在西西里岛附近登上影子舰队油轮
summary: France’s navy boarded another oil tanker in the Mediterranean as Europe seeks to crack down on Russian shadow-fleet ships used to export sanctioned crude.

title: US Senate Votes Down Iran War Powers Resolution
title_cn: 美国参议院否决伊朗战争权力决议
summary: The US Senate rejected a resolution to end the war with Iran as two Republicans flipped their votes hours after President Donald Trump confronted GOP senators for backing an earlier resolution to end the conflict. Kate Ackley of Bloomberg Government has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary Yields Approach UK Gilts as Pro-EU Turn Fuels Rally
title_cn: 匈牙利国债收益率逼近英国国债，亲欧盟立场推动涨势
summary: Hungary’s bonds have rallied so much that yields are approaching those in the UK, the latest sign that investors are backing the new government’s plans to fix the economy and join the euro region.

title: ‘We’ve Fallen Behind’: Canada Races to Break Supply Chain Gridlock Choking Trade
title_cn: “我们已经落后了”：加拿大竞相打破阻碍贸易的供应链僵局
summary: In the eyes of Transport Minister Steven MacKinnon, the sheer size of Canada is both blessing and curse.

title: Australia Faces a Trumpian Turn in Politics
title_cn: 澳大利亚政治面临特朗普式转变
summary: Pauline Hanson’s far right One Nation is no longer an outsider on the political stage.
